summary: South Bay startups raised nearly $4 billion over six weeks, with AI and semiconductor plays dominating: Nexthop AI snagged $500M in Santa Clara, SiFive closed a $400M Series G in Santa Clara, and Rhoda AI pulled in $450M in Palo Alto. Meanwhile, most local tech firms are hiring steadily, though a handful are tightening belts as the funding surge continues to reshape the region's startup landscape.
